```markdown
|---|---|
|Absorption<br>Chiller<br>Cooling<br>Capacity<br>Adjustment<br>Curve(s)|This curve or group of curves represents the available total cooling capacity of the absorption chiller as a function of evaporator<br>and condenser conditions.<br>(1)<br>where<br>Qavailable = available cooling capacity at present evaporator and<br>condenser conditions, in MBH,<br>CAP_FTAC = cooling capacity adjustment determined using Equation<br>(2), and<br>Qrated = rated capacity at ARI conditions, in MBH.<br>(2)<br>where<br>tchws = chilled water supply temperature, in °F,<br>tcws = condenser water supply temperature, in °F, and<br>a-f = applicable coefficients as follows:<br>Capacity Coefficients for Calculation of CAP_FTAC<br>Absorption<br>a<br>b<br>c<br>d<br>e<br>f<br>Single-effect<br>0.723412<br>0.079006<br>0.000897<br>–0.025285<br>–0.000048<br>0.000276<br>Double-effect<br>–0.816039<br>–0.038707<br>0.000450<br>0.071491<br>–0.000636<br>0.000312<br>Direct-fired<br>1.0<br>0<br>0<br>0<br>0<br>0|
|Absorption<br>Chiller:<br>Steam-driven,<br>Single- and<br>Double-effect<br>Chiller<br>Efficiency<br>Curve(s)|This curve or group of curves varies the cooling efficiency of a steam-driven, single- and double-effect absorption chiller as a function<br>of evaporator and condenser conditions and part-load ratio.<br>(3)<br>where<br>Fuelpartload = fuel consumption at specified operating conditions, in<br>Btu/h,<br>Fuelrated = rated fuel consumption at ARI conditions, in Btu/h,<br>FIR_FPLR = fuel input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to<br>changes in load determined using Equation (4),<br>FIR_FT = fuel input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to<br>environmental variables determined using Equation (6),<br>and<br>CAP_FTAC = value determined using Equation (2).<br>(4)<br>where<br>PLR = part-load ratio based on available capacity (not rated<br>capacity) determined using Equation (5), and<br>a-c = applicable coefficients as follows:<br>Efficiency Coefficients for Calculation of FIR_FPLR<br>Absorption<br>a<br>b<br>c<br>Single-effect<br>0.098585<br>0.583850<br>0.560658<br><br>Double-effect<br>0.013994<br>1.240449<br>–0.914883<br>(5)<br>where<br>Qoperating = present load on chiller, in Btu/h, and<br>Qavailable = chiller available capacity at present evaporator and<br>condenser conditions, in Btu/h, determined using<br>Equation (1).<br>(6)|
```
